title: Replace distorted manager photo with new uploaded image

requirements.summary: Replace the distorted manager photo in the Meet the Manager section with the newly uploaded image
acceptanceCriteria: The Meet the Manager section displays the new uploaded photo (556973191_25294936933424537_2300403285239686172_n.jpg) instead of the current distorted 90s.jpg image
The photo is properly sized and positioned within the Meet the Manager section
The image path references the correct file in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The distorted 90s.jpg file is no longer referenced in the Meet the Manager section

file_operations.description: Update the manager photo in the Meet the Manager section to reference the new uploaded image at frontend/public/assets/556973191_25294936933424537_2300403285239686172_n.jpg instead of the current 90s.jpg. Change the src attribute of the img element in the manager section while preserving all other styling, layout, and content including the biography text and phone number.
